name: Lifecycle
description: Core concept representing contract lifecycle: the sequence of states (draft, active, notice-pending, cure, terminated, surviving) a contract passes through from formation to discharge.

name: Notice Timeline
description: An express notice period governing termination, non-renewal, or cure, expressed as a defined number of days and a delivery requirement.

name: Illegal Lifecycle State Transition
description: Contract language attempting to move the agreement between lifecycle states in a legally invalid sequence, such as reinstating or reviving a terminated agreement, or terminating it retroactively, without a new agreement or novation.
